title: arum orientale subsp. detruncatum
intro: Arum orientale subsp. detruncatum, also known as the Dragon's Blood lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arum orientale subsp. detruncatum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although it can also be found in some herbal supplements and topical creams.
